'''Yin Water Ox''' is the 50th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 癸 Mizunoto (yin water, the luna-aligned face of winter), and its branch is 丑 Ushi, the [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's earth overcomes the stem's water, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Water Rat]] (node 49) and [[Yang Wood Tiger]] (node 51).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Mizunoto (癸)]] — yin water
* '''Branch:''' [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] — yin earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' winter

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Water Rat]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Wood Tiger]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q267521}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
